_meta.purpose: Hotel-ranking overlay for normalized TravelWits results.
_meta.coverage: All 44 preferred-partner brand/program sections, all hotel-relevant individual partner sections, and property-level exceptions or named participants needed to resolve amenities.
_meta.security: Booking codes, passwords, IATA numbers, advisor contacts, and private access instructions are intentionally excluded.
_meta.stalenessWarning: The source document is dated 2025-09-18. Confirm current participation and rate eligibility before displaying benefits as guaranteed.

rules: Do not infer upgradeAtBooking from generic room-upgrade language.
Subject-to-availability benefits remain conditional even when confirmed at booking.
Exact property exclusions override brand or program benefits.
Records with status review-required or verify-program-participation must not receive an amenity boost until confirmed.
Benefits that are only described as Virtuoso or Virtuoso-type require a live rate/program check before display.

benefits: Virtuoso amenities and benefits upon an eligible confirmed booking
Enhanced recognition and welcome from property management
Personalized welcome amenity from the advisor
Priority room upgrade upon arrival, subject to availability
Enhanced recognition and welcome from property management
Personalized welcome amenity from the advisor
Priority room upgrade upon arrival, subject to availability
